v3 Scoring Methodology

Pipeline Overview

The v3 pipeline extracts hyper-entities from 109 foresight sources (podcasts, world-gallery scenarios, reports), then scores them across multiple dimensions using Claude-based assessment.

d/acc Values Alignment (0-20)

Based on Vitalik Buterin's d/acc framework. Four dimensions, each scored 0-5:

DimensionWhat it measures
Democratic (0-5)Does the entity distribute decision-making power broadly?
Decentralized (0-5)Does the entity reduce single points of failure or control?
Defensive (0-5)Does the entity protect against misuse, attacks, or concentration of power?
Differential (0-5)Does the entity accelerate defense faster than offense?

Transformative Potential (0-5)

How fundamentally could this entity reshape its domain if fully realized? Score of 5 indicates civilizational-level transformation.

Readiness Bottleneck

The primary barrier to the entity becoming real:

  • Physics - Fundamental science not yet understood
  • Engineering - Science known, engineering challenges remain
  • Funding - Technically feasible, needs capital
  • Regulation - Technology exists, regulatory barriers
  • Coordination - Needs multi-stakeholder alignment
  • Social Acceptance - Public perception/adoption barrier

What To Do Now (Action)

The most impactful near-term action for advancing the entity:

  • Fund - Direct capital to existing efforts
  • Build - Start building prototypes/implementations
  • Research - Invest in foundational research
  • Advocate - Build public support and awareness
  • Convene - Bring stakeholders together

Data Sources

109 sources across podcast transcripts, Existential Hope world-gallery scenarios, AI pathways documents, and hope-themed Twitter/X threads.
